title: Settings
advancedHint: Harder questions, mixed tables, and faster unlocks. Turn off anytime to ease difficulty.
expertHint: Much harder questions, strict timers in practice games, and combo rewards. For kids who already know the basics.
expertTimerHint: When Expert is on, Sprint and Boss can auto-submit wrong if time runs out. Turn off to remove per-question time limits.
resetConfirm: Reset all stars and progress? This cannot be undone.
